calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $2,700. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-18-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
